title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXVIII. Love And Matrimony.
content:
On Saturday night,
        Shall be all my care
        To powder my locks
        And curl my hair.

        On Sunday morning
        My love will come in,
        When he will marry me
        With a gold ring.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXVIII. Love And Matrimony.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
